programme.title: Forbidden Science - Age of Cyborgs
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. This relaxation film is accompanied by a comforting soundtrack of bird songs and sheep baas. Run Time 60 Minutes. {[TrailerUrl:https://vimeo.com/793648259]}

programme.title: Sounds of the Sierra
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the enchanting sights and sounds of summer in the Sierra Nevada mountains. This film features beautiful alpine scenery accompanied by an array of soothing nature sounds: thundering waterfalls, flowing creeks, singing birds, rainfall, and a host of other sounds that create "nature's summer symphony". Run Time 2 Hours.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra heads to Evanston, IL to visit with Northwestern's Izzy Scane. Izzy has been a dominant force for the Wildcats since she first arrived on campus. With a National title, the Tewaaraton Award winner, and record shattering season – she has cemented herself as an all-time great. We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: We head to Denver, CO to profile Ethan Walker: arguably the greatest shooter in college lacrosse. While also uncovering why the storied success of the Denver program has been fueled by top Canadian talent. We also went to Princeton to uncover the speed and power of Michael Sowers: An attackman who's mental approach to the game has risen him to record-breaking success within a program built on legendary offensive lacrosse players.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: We travel to Loyola University to breakdown the basketball influenced playing style of Pat Spencer – While storying his evolution to becoming arguably the best playmaker in college lacrosse. We also travel to Albany to explore the Danes' attack factory led by Connor Fields and Tehoka Nanticoke this spring. We learn how these guys came to lacrosse, the coaching philosophy of Scott Marr, and how the Thompsons laid the groundwork for a new style of play in upstate New York.

programme.title: Law of the 45's
programme.desc: A determined lawman takes on a gang of outlaws terrorizing the frontier, using his skill with a .45 to restore order and protect innocent settlers.

programme.title: Fugitive Valley (1941)
programme.desc: The Range Busters pursue a group of outlaws hiding in a remote valley, uncovering a scheme of robbery and murder as they work to track down the fugitives and bring them to justice.

programme.title: Song of Texas (1943)
programme.desc: A cowboy singer rides into Texas and becomes entangled in a land dispute between honest settlers and a group of outlaws. Using both his quick wits and musical charm, he helps bring justice to the territory while protecting those caught in the conflict.

programme.title: Jesse James Woman -1954
programme.desc: After the death of the infamous outlaw Jesse James, a determined woman gathers a group of loyal female followers to continue his legacy of crime. As they carry out daring robberies and evade the law, rivalries and danger threaten to tear the gang apart in the unforgiving frontier

programme.title: Red River Valley (1936)
programme.desc: Gene Autry helps a young woman defend her ranch from a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of the land, uncovering a plot of deception and greed while working to bring the criminals to justice

programme.title: Four of the Apocalypse 1975
programme.desc: In Four of the Apocalypse, director Lucio Fulci delivers a gritty and haunting Spaghetti Western. After a crooked sheriff banishes four misfits—a gambler, a prostitute, a drunk, and a simple-minded man—they journey across a lawless frontier searching for survival and redemption. But their path collides with a sadistic bandit, plunging them into violence, cruelty, and despair. Blending raw brutality with moments of tenderness, this bleak tale explores the struggle for humanity in a world gone savage.

programme.title: Bells Of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys.

programme.title: Man From Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who don't know their land holds lots of gold, Gene puts a stop to it.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown (1952)
programme.desc: In Colorado Sundown, Rex Allen stars in a Western adventure of land, greed, and justice on the frontier. When cattlemen and timber interests clash over valuable mountain property, Rex steps in to keep the peace and expose the schemers fueling the feud. With his faithful horse Koko, the comedy of Slim Pickens, and songs that echo across the range, this action-packed tale blends music, mystery, and six-gun justice under the wide Colorado sky.

programme.title: Frontier Pony Express
programme.desc: As Yankee and Rebel forces contend for the allegiance of California, Pony Express rider Roy and his sidekick must round up a pack of villains before Roy can turn his attentions to the girl.

programme.title: Rangers
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he visits a few rangers in our national parks. In this episode, we'll travel to Yellowstone National Park to learn how rescue dogs can find people caught in an avalanche and how rangers manage trails in harsh winter conditions. From there trips to Hawaii and Utah will see how rangers keep visitors safe from dangerous conditions and how technology can connect us to our parks more and more.

programme.title: Rangers
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he visits a few rangers in our national parks. In this episode, we'll travel to Yellowstone National Park to learn how rescue dogs can find people caught in an avalanche and how rangers manage trails in harsh winter conditions. From there trips to Hawaii and Utah will see how rangers keep visitors safe from dangerous conditions and how technology can connect us to our parks more and more.
